data.body:
[Kikyou Special MV – “Warmth” Release!]

Sensei!
Kikyou’s gentle and sweet new track “Warmth” has been released.
Enjoy the vibe of this Neo City Pop–style song!

🌧💧 Listen Now 🌧💧
https://youtube.com/watch?v=GwiGZBnbmEc
